Thank you! I'd like to share a formula that will help much. Use this:  "[Price]*v_up_5" - This will give you a '5 min. Dollar volume'  It works pre/post/market. This will always show you the stocks with the most $ volume in the last 5 min. I have found this is extremely helpful in finding the runners. Of course you can also use "[Price]*v_up_1" for the 1 min. $Volume. Happy trading everyone.
